# Lightbox Digital

> Lightbox Digital is Josh Chappell, a one-man video production and photography crew
> in Phoenix, Arizona. He makes commercials, website landing videos, social media
> content, professional interviews, event recaps, FAA Part 107 drone footage, and
> brand photography for schools, contractors, medical practices, and businesses of
> every kind. Rated 5.0 across 11 Google reviews.

Contact: josh.lightbox@gmail.com
Service area: Phoenix, Scottsdale, Mesa, Tempe, Chandler, Gilbert, Glendale, and all of Arizona.

## Pages
- [Home](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/): services, industries, featured work, FAQ
- [Video Portfolio](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/portfolio.html): 18 client productions with Vimeo embeds
- [Education](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/education.html): enrollment-driving video for schools and universities
- [Construction, Trades & Industrial](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/construction.html): videos that win bids
- [Medical](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/medical.html): patient-trust videos for practices
- [Commercial & Everything Else](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/commercial.html): real estate, attractions, events
- [Photography](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/photography.html): portraits, brand, school, sports, events
- [About](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/about.html): Josh Chappell, FAA Part 107 certified videographer
- [Reviews](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/reviews.html): all 11 five-star Google reviews
- [Contact](https://jchappellmedia.github.io/lightbox-digital-site/contact.html): project inquiry form

## Notable clients & projects
Grand Canyon University, Blandford Homes, Butterfly Wonderland, Jacuzzi, Charter One,
Baths For The Brave, Arrowhead Lakes Dentistry, Applied Tech, NCAA event coverage.
